home.title: Cookieria Simulator
home.description: Learn how ingredient changes affect a chocolate chip cookie before moving into the later simulator and quiz flow.

learning_steps.title: Intro and Goal
body: Your goal is to create each cookie type by adjusting ingredients.
This learning flow gives the player the ingredient knowledge they will use later in the simulator.

learning_steps.title: Ingredient Overview
body: These four ingredients are the main variables for the cookie outcomes in this prototype.

learning_steps.title: Butter
body: Butter controls how much a cookie spreads during baking.
learning_steps.highlight: More butter leads to flatter cookies.

learning_steps.title: Flour
body: Flour adds structure and helps a cookie hold its shape.
learning_steps.highlight: More flour leads to thicker cookies.

learning_steps.title: White Sugar
body: White sugar increases spread and helps create a crisper texture.
learning_steps.highlight: More white sugar makes cookies crispier and flatter.

learning_steps.title: Brown Sugar
body: Brown sugar adds moisture to the dough and changes the texture.
learning_steps.highlight: More brown sugar makes cookies softer and chewier.

learning_steps.title: Ready to Simulate
body: You have finished the lesson portion and now know how butter, flour, and sugars change a cookie's texture.
Next, you will move into the simulator to test those ideas by adjusting ingredients and baking different cookie outcomes.
After the simulator, you will continue into the quiz to show what you learned.

quiz_placeholder.title: Quiz
quiz_placeholder.message: Use what you learned in the lesson and simulator to answer each cookie question.

results_page.title: Quiz Results
results_page.description: Here is a quick summary of how you did and how you used the app.
